milestones.summary: Schema-data migration runner library — the downstream package that executes authored migrations against real records.
First stable release. **Public API frozen.** No source changes from v0.8.0 — this milestone freezes the exported surface and ships release metadata (Apache-2.0 license; the `nekostack` metapackage).
Schema-data migration planning + provenance verification + stub generation.
Runtime validation as a NekoStack-owned workflow on the v0.2 source-generator + v0.5 composition foundation.
Composition layer on the v0.1 IR foundation.

next_actions: migrate-runner v0.1.0 shipped and verified with 405 tests (full purity suite restored). schema v1.0.0 shipped — public API frozen, Apache-2.0, nekostack metapackage published.
Pivot to v1.0 Hardening: Freeze the public API surface of @nekostack/schema and @nekostack/migrate-runner. No new feature work until v1.0 is stamped.
Draft the 'Zod-to-NekoStack' migration guide and complete the IssueCode catalog documentation.
Resolve the remaining 'Still-open' implementation decisions in the schema package README (Transform precedence, Async refinements).
Identify performance benchmarks against Zod/TypeBox to prove production readiness.
